docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, REMZON AS TO DEFENDANT HEAGNEY, MARTIN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
